lines: Norway are absolutely mugging everyone off. Brazil — BRAZIL — went home 1–2 to a nation whose biggest cultural export is sad piano music and expensive cheese. Al, Butters, Callum, Croft and Wilmot are all laughing their arses off, but none more so than Butters who leads the table on 80pts with Norway still strutting around like they own the place.

England did their best to give everyone a heart attack but sneaked past Mexico 2–3, which means Carter climbs to 4th and Wilmot — already drowning in Norway points — is quietly becoming a threat to Butters at the top. Watch those two.

Today's headline act: Portugal vs Spain, and it's personal. Butters (1st, 80pts) needs Ronaldo's mob to keep the dream alive, while Jim (6th, 51pts) is desperately clinging on with Spain as his only realistic route back into this thing after Morocco, Sweden and Qatar carried him to precisely fuck all combined glory.

Special mention to Ellis — sitting last on 38pts — whose Argentina are still in it but whose other three teams have collectively been eliminated faster than a WhatsApp read receipt at 2am. South Korea, Paraguay, New Zealand. Truly a fuck of a draw, mate.

USA vs Belgium is the kind of fixture that'll be forgotten by Thursday, but keep an eye on Portugal vs Spain — if Jim nicks it, he's back in the conversation. If Butters wins, someone's going to have to start taking that smug bastard seriously.
